title: Match `devcom` and `iftime`
author: mchen91
body:
I was getting this error during the build: `ERROR Size mismatch for @260 (type Object) at 0x804D5790: Expected 0x4, found 0x1`
I'm not certain this is the proper fix, so please let me know if there is a better way to deal with it

title: Match `devcom` and `iftime`
author: PsiLupan
body: In this case, it's the `symbols.txt` file has the symbols, their address, their associated size, and type. The auto-size was just 4 and if it's corrected, it should be resolved.

title: Match `devcom` and `iftime`
author: mchen91
body: Thank you, I've updated the size in the symbols file
